top_signals.title: Warsh Says Inflation Risks Are Down, Vows Price Stability - Bloomberg
top_signals.summary: Warsh Says Inflation Risks Are Down, Vows Price Stability  Bloomberg
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Spyware found on phone of European Parliament member probing it
top_signals.summary: Stelios Kouloglou, formerly a member of the European Parliament's committee investigating abuses of commercial spyware, was twice infected with Pegasus while serving, researchers said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The Tech Download: Amazon’s devices chief Panos Panay on tech giant's AI gadget push
top_signals.summary: CNBC's Arjun Kharpal sits down Amazon's Panay on the latest episode of The Tech Download podcast.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Japan needs caregivers. Young Indians are answering the call.
top_signals.summary: From classrooms in India's northeast to nursing homes in Japan, an emerging labor corridor hopes to improve lives in both countries.

top_signals.title: Supreme Court decision threatens EU-US data transfer agreement
top_signals.summary: In a Tuesday letter, Max Schrems, the founder of the Vienna-based privacy advocacy organization noyb, told European officials he plans to sue to invalidate the EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework (DPF) that allows for the transfer of personal data from the EU to U.S. companies.

alerts.title: Supreme Court decision threatens EU-US data transfer agreement
